rulings.Case Title: IN THE MATTER OF THE WALTER P. FRICK AND MARIE DORETTE FRICK REVOCABLE TRUST
rulings.Calendar Matter: Petition For Instructions Concerning Payment Of Rent, Sale Of Trust Assets, And Distribution To Beneficiaries
rulings.Rulings: Appearance required. The following issues are cited by the Examiner: 1) Court to determine whether any requests made in the petition or amendment to petition filed on 2/21/17 should be granted. 2) Petitioner requests appointment of Kurt Trutner as successor trustee, to serve without bond. No basis for waiver of bond is provided. 3) Courtesy copy of amended petition and declaration filed on 2/21/17 has not been provided. 4) Proposed order on amended petition has not been submitted.
